'''shamodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyrielle|kyrielle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyrielle|kyrielle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shamodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæmedeth|shæmedeth]] || [[word:shæmedej|shæmedej]] || [[word:shæmedesh|shæmedesh]] || [[word:shæmede|shæmede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamomodoth|shamomodoth]] || [[word:shamomodoj|shamomodoj]] || [[word:shamomodosh|shamomodosh]] || [[word:shamomodo|shamomodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamodoth|shamodoth]] || [[word:shamodoj|shamodoj]] || [[word:shamodosh|shamodosh]] || [[word:shamodo|shamodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamofdoth|shamofdoth]] || [[word:shamofdoj|shamofdoj]] || [[word:shamofdosh|shamofdosh]] || [[word:shamofdof|shamofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shamodotho|shamodotho]] || [[word:shamodojo|shamodojo]] || [[word:shamodosho|shamodosho]] || [[word:shamodoko|shamodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shamodoth|shamodoth]] || [[word:shamodoj|shamodoj]] || [[word:shamodosh|shamodosh]] || [[word:shamodo|shamodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shamodothol|shamodothol]] || [[word:shamodojol|shamodojol]] || [[word:shamodoshol|shamodoshol]] || [[word:shamodokol|shamodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shamodothotho|shamodothotho]] || [[word:shamodojojo|shamodojojo]] || [[word:shamodoshosho|shamodoshosho]] || [[word:shamodoko|shamodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shamodothon|shamodothon]] || [[word:shamodojon|shamodojon]] || [[word:shamodoshon|shamodoshon]] || [[word:shamodokon|shamodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shamodothoro|shamodothoro]] || [[word:shamodojoro|shamodojoro]] || [[word:shamodoshoro|shamodoshoro]] || [[word:shamodokoro|shamodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
